title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud-based services. It can lead to data loss, operational disruption, and financial damage, especially if critical CI/CD pipelines are compromised.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and monitor CI/CD pipelines for unauthorized activity.
Regularly back up critical data and ensure backups are stored in isolated environments.
Deploy advanced endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to identify and mitigate ransomware threats in real time.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat, but its widespread adoption could lead to potential risks if the tool has undisclosed vulnerabilities or if attackers exploit its usage to identify and target unpatched systems.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the security and reliability of the tool before integrating it into workflows.
Monitor for updates or disclosures regarding vulnerabilities in the tool itself.
Educate teams on the proper use of the tool to avoid exposing sensitive information or creating new attack vectors.

title: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server contains a vulnerability where an attacker could cause a server...
description: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server contains a vulnerability where an attacker could cause a server crash by sending a malformed request to the server. A successful exploit of this vulnerability might lead to denial of service.

title: NVIDIA DALI contains a vulnerability where an attacker could cause a deserialization of untrusted...
description: NVIDIA DALI contains a vulnerability where an attacker could cause a deserialization of untrusted data. A successful exploit of this vulnerability might lead to arbitrary code execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-24156.

title: Cockpit's remote login feature passes user-supplied hostnames and usernames from the web...
description: Cockpit's remote login feature passes user-supplied hostnames and usernames from the web interface to the SSH client without validation or sanitization. An attacker with network access to the Cockpit web service can craft a single HTTP request to the login endpoint that injects malicious SSH options or shell commands, achieving code execution on the Cockpit host without valid credentials. The injection occurs during the authentication flow before any credential verification takes place, meaning

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4631.

title: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server contains a vulnerability where an attacker could cause a server...
description: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server contains a vulnerability where an attacker could cause a server crash by sending a malformed request to the server. A successful exploit of this vulnerability might lead to denial of service.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in NVIDIA Triton Inference Server could allow attackers to crash the server by sending malformed requests, leading to a denial of service. This could disrupt AI/ML workflows and critical inference operations.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch provided by NVIDIA to mitigate the vulnerability.
Implement input validation and monitoring mechanisms to detect and block malformed requests.
Conduct a thorough review of server configurations and limit exposure to untrusted networks.

title: OpenViking versions prior to 0.3.3 contain a missing authorization vulnerability in the task...
description: OpenViking versions prior to 0.3.3 contain a missing authorization vulnerability in the task polling endpoints that allows unauthorized attackers to enumerate or retrieve background task metadata created by other users. Attackers can access the /api/v1/tasks and /api/v1/tasks/{task_id} routes without authentication to expose task type, task status, resource identifiers, archive URIs, result payloads, and error information, potentially causing cross-tenant interference in multi-tenant deployments

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-22680.

title: MRCMS 3.1.2 contains an access control vulnerability. The save() method in src/main/java/org...
description: MRCMS 3.1.2 contains an access control vulnerability. The save() method in src/main/java/org/marker/mushroom/controller/UserController.java lacks proper authorization validation, enabling direct addition of super administrator accounts without authentication.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthorized users to escalate privileges by directly adding super administrator accounts, potentially leading to full system compromise, data breaches, and unauthorized access to sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Immediately patch the MRCMS 3.1.2 system by applying the latest security updates or implementing a hotfix to validate authorization in the save() method.
Conduct a comprehensive review of access control mechanisms across the application to identify and address similar vulnerabilities.
Monitor system logs for any unauthorized creation of super administrator accounts and take immediate action to remove them and secure the system.

title: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server contains a vulnerability where an attacker could cause a server...
description: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server contains a vulnerability where an attacker could cause a server crash by sending a malformed request header to the server. A successful exploit of this vulnerability might lead to denial of service.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in NVIDIA Triton Inference Server allows attackers to crash the server by sending malformed request headers, potentially leading to a denial of service (DoS) and disrupting AI/ML workloads or other critical applications relying on the server.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update provided by NVIDIA to address CVE-2026-24175.
Implement input validation and monitoring tools to detect and block malformed request headers.
Deploy rate-limiting and anomaly detection mechanisms to mitigate potential DoS attacks.

title: OpenHarness prior to commit 166fcfe contains an improper access control vulnerability in built-in...
description: OpenHarness prior to commit 166fcfe contains an improper access control vulnerability in built-in file tools due to inconsistent parameter handling in permission enforcement, allowing attackers who can influence agent tool execution to read arbitrary local files outside the intended repository scope. Attackers can exploit the path parameter not being passed to the PermissionChecker in read_file, write_file, edit_file, and notebook_edit tools to bypass deny rules and access sensitive files such a

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in OpenHarness allows attackers to bypass access controls and read arbitrary local files outside the intended repository scope. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive data, intellectual property, or credentials, potentially resulting in data breaches, privilege escalation, or further exploitation of the affected system.
recommended_actions: Immediately update OpenHarness to a version that includes commit 166fcfe or later to patch the vulnerability.
Review and audit file access logs to detect any unauthorized access attempts or suspicious activity.
Implement additional monitoring and alerting mechanisms to detect exploitation attempts targeting this vulnerability.

title: megagao production_ssm v1.0 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in the user addition...
description: megagao production_ssm v1.0 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in the user addition functionality. The insert() method in UserController.java lacks authentication checks, allowing unauthenticated attackers to create super administrator accounts by directly accessing the /user/insert endpoint. This leads to complete system compromise.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31271.

title: Authenticated DoS over CQL in Apache Cassandra 4.0, 4.1, 5.0 allows authenticated user to raise...
description:
Authenticated DoS over CQL in Apache Cassandra 4.0, 4.1, 5.0 allows authenticated user to raise query latencies via repeated password changes.
Users are recommended to upgrade to version 4.0.20, 4.1.11, 5.0.7, which fixes this issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32588.

title: Sensitive Information Leak in cqlsh in Apache Cassandra 4.0 allows access to sensitive...
description:
Sensitive Information Leak in cqlsh in Apache Cassandra 4.0 allows access to sensitive information, like passwords, from previously executed cqlsh command via  ~/.cassandra/cqlsh_history local file access.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 4.0.20, which fixes this issue.

--
Description: Cassandra's command-line tool, cqlsh, provides a command history feature that allows users to recall previously executed commands using the up/down arrow keys. These history records are saved in the ~

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-27315.

title: A flaw was found in libarchive. A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the ACL...
description: A flaw was found in libarchive. A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the ACL parsing logic, specifically within the archive_acl_from_text_nl() function. When processing a malformed ACL string (such as a bare "d" or "default" tag without subsequent fields), the function fails to perform adequate validation before advancing the pointer. An attacker can exploit this by providing a maliciously crafted archive, causing an application utilizing the libarchive API (such as bsdtar) to cras

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5745.

title: Windmill CE and EE versions 1.276.0 through 1.603.2 contain an SQL injection vulnerability in the...
description: Windmill CE and EE versions 1.276.0 through 1.603.2 contain an SQL injection vulnerability in the folder ownership management functionality that allows authenticated attackers to inject SQL through the owner parameter. An attacker can use the injection to read sensitive data such as the JWT signing secret and administrative user identifiers, forge an administrative token, and then execute arbitrary code via the workflow execution endpoints.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-23696.

title: Windmill versions 1.56.0 through 1.614.0 contain a missing authorization vulnerability that...
description: Windmill versions 1.56.0 through 1.614.0 contain a missing authorization vulnerability that allows users with the Operator role to perform prohibited entity creation and modification actions via the backend API. Although Operators are documented and priced as unable to create or modify entities, the API does not enforce the Operator restriction on workspace endpoints, allowing an Operator to create and update scripts, flows, apps, and raw_apps. Since Operators can also execute scripts via the jo

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The missing authorization vulnerability in Windmill versions 1.56.0 through 1.614.0 allows users with the Operator role to bypass documented restrictions and perform unauthorized actions, such as creating and modifying entities via the backend API. This could lead to unauthorized changes in workflows, scripts, and applications, potentially resulting in data manipulation, privilege escalation, or disruption of business processes.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to a patched version of Windmill (if available) or apply any vendor-recommended mitigations.
Restrict access to the backend API by implementing network-level controls, such as IP whitelisting or VPN access, to limit exposure.
Audit and monitor Operator activity logs for any unauthorized entity creation or modification actions.

title: The Backup Migration plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in all versions...
description: The Backup Migration plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in all versions up to, and including, 2.0.0. This is due to a missing capability check on the 'initializeOfflineAjax' function and lack of proper nonce verification. The endpoint only validates against hardcoded tokens which are publicly exposed in the plugin's JavaScript. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to trigger the backup upload queue processing, potentially causing unexpected backup transfe

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-14944.

title: Privilege escalation in Apache Cassandra 5.0 on an mTLS environment using MutualTlsAuthenticator...
description:
Privilege escalation in Apache Cassandra 5.0 on an mTLS environment using MutualTlsAuthenticator allows a user with only CREATE permission to associate their own certificate identity with an arbitrary role,
including a superuser role, and authenticate as that role via ADD IDENTITY.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 5.0.7+, which fixes this issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows attackers to escalate privileges by associating their certificate identity with arbitrary roles, including superuser roles, potentially leading to unauthorized access and control over sensitive data and systems.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Apache Cassandra to version 5.0.7 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Review and audit permissions for users with CREATE privileges to ensure no unauthorized access.
Implement additional monitoring and logging to detect suspicious privilege escalation attempts.

title: Smart contract Marginal v1 performs unsafe downcast, allowing attackers to settle a large debt...
description: Smart contract Marginal v1 performs unsafe downcast, allowing attackers to settle a large debt position for a negligible asset cost.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4931.

title: The Send Basket functionality in Koha Library before 23.05.10 is susceptible to Time-Based SQL...
description: The Send Basket functionality in Koha Library before 23.05.10 is susceptible to Time-Based SQL Injection because it fails to sanitize the POST parameter bib_list in /cgi-bin/koha/opac-sendbasket.pl, allowing library users to read arbitrary data from the database.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthorized users to exploit a Time-Based SQL Injection in the 'Send Basket' functionality of Koha Library, potentially exposing sensitive database information such as user credentials, borrowing history, and other critical library data. This could lead to data breaches, privacy violations, and reputational damage.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Koha Library to version 23.05.10 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Conduct a thorough review of database logs to identify any signs of exploitation or unauthorized access.
Implement input validation and sanitization for all user-supplied data to prevent similar vulnerabilities in the future.

title: CVE-2026-4020 - The Gravity SMTP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all version
description: The Gravity SMTP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 2.1.4. This is due to a REST API endpoint registered at /wp-json/gravitysmtp/v1/tests/mock-data with a permission_callback that unconditionally returns true, allowing any unauthenticated visitor to access it. When the ?page=gravitysmtp-settings query parameter is appended, the plugin's register_connector_data() method populates internal connector data, causing the endpoint to return approximately 365 KB of JSON containing the full System Report. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to retrieve detailed system configuration data including PHP version, loaded extensions, web server version, document root path, database server type and version, WordPress version, all active plugins with versions, active theme, WordPress configuration details, database table names, and any API keys/tokens configured in the plugin.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4020.

title: CVE-2026-3300 - The Everest Forms Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution via PHP Code Injec
description: The Everest Forms Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution via PHP Code Injection in all versions up to, and including, 1.9.12. This is due to the Calculation Addon's process_filter() function concatenating user-submitted form field values into a PHP code string without proper escaping before passing it to eval(). The sanitize_text_field() function applied to input does not escape single quotes or other PHP code context characters. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject and execute arbitrary PHP code on the server by submitting a crafted value in any string-type form field (text, email, URL, select, radio) when a form uses the "Complex Calculation" feature.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code on the server, potentially leading to full site compromise, data theft, defacement, or further exploitation of the hosting environment. This could also enable attackers to pivot to other systems within the network.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or disable the Everest Forms Pro plugin if a patched version is available. Check for updates from the plugin vendor.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to block malicious payloads targeting the vulnerable plugin.
Conduct a thorough audit of your WordPress site for unauthorized changes or suspicious activity, and restore from a clean backup if compromise is detected.

title: CVE-2026-5115 - The PaperCut NG/MF (specifically, the embedded application for Konica Minolta devices) is vulnerable
description:
The PaperCut NG/MF (specifically, the embedded application for Konica Minolta devices) is vulnerable to session hijacking. The PaperCut NG/MF Embedded application is a software interface that runs directly on the touch screen of a multi-function device.

It was internally discovered that the communication channel between the embedded application and the server was insecure, which could leak data including sensitive information that may be used to mount an  attack on the device. Such an attack could potentially be used to steal data or to perform a phishing attack on the end user.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5115.

title: CVE-2026-4794 - Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in PaperCut NG/MF before 25.0.10 allow authentic
description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in PaperCut NG/MF before 25.0.10 allow authenticated administrator users to inject arbitrary web script or HTML code via different UI fields. This could be used to compromise other admininistrator's sessions or perform unauthorized actions via the administrator's authenticated context (e.g. requires an active login session).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4794.

title: CVE-2026-30940 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, a path traversal vulnerability
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, a path traversal vulnerability exists in the theme file management API (/baser/api/admin/bc-theme-file/theme_files/add.json) that allows arbitrary file write. An authenticated administrator can include ../ sequences in the path parameter to create a PHP file in an arbitrary directory outside the theme directory, which may result in remote code execution (RCE). This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-30940.

title: CVE-2026-30878 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, a public mail submission API al
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, a public mail submission API allows unauthenticated users to submit mail form entries even when the corresponding form is not accepting submissions. This bypasses administrative controls intended to stop form intake and enables spam or abuse via the API. This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-30878.

title: CVE-2026-30877 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, there is an OS command injectio
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, there is an OS command injection vulnerability in the update functionality. Due to this issue, an authenticated user with administrator privileges in baserCMS can execute arbitrary OS commands on the server with the privileges of the user account running baserCMS. This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, baserCMS has a SQL injection vulnerability in blog posts. This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

title: CVE-2026-21861 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, baserCMS contains an OS command
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, baserCMS contains an OS command injection vulnerability in the core update functionality. An authenticated administrator can execute arbitrary OS commands on the server due to improper handling of user-controlled input that is directly passed to exec() without sufficient validation or escaping. This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-21861.

title: CVE-2025-32957 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, the application's restore funct
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, the application's restore function allows users to upload a .zip file, which is then automatically extracted. A PHP file inside the archive is included using require_once without validating or restricting the filename. An attacker can craft a malicious PHP file within the zip and achieve arbitrary code execution when it is included. This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2025-32957.

title: CVE-2026-5157 - A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Online Food Ordering System 1.0. Affected is an unkn
description: A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Online Food Ordering System 1.0. Affected is an unknown function of the file /form/order.php of the component Order Module. Such manipulation of the argument cust_id leads to cross site scripting. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit is publicly available and might be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5157.

title: CVE-2026-5156 - A vulnerability was determined in Tenda CH22 1.0.0.1. This impacts the function formQuickIndex of th
description: A vulnerability was determined in Tenda CH22 1.0.0.1. This impacts the function formQuickIndex of the file /goform/QuickIndex of the component Parameter Handler. This manipulation of the argument mit_linktype causes stack-based buffer overflow. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5156.
